g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the input latch stage work in a 4-stage pipelined binary perceptron for Tiny Tapeout?')
sendPrompt('How does the AND array stage compute binary weighted products in the pipelined perceptron?')
sendPrompt('How does the adder tree stage sum the products in the pipelined perceptron?')
sendPrompt('How does the threshold comparator stage produce the fire signal in the pipelined perceptron?')
sendPrompt('How are binary weights stored and loaded into the perceptron weight registers?')
sendPrompt('How does the threshold register control the firing decision in the perceptron?')
